summary: Successfully cleaned meeting system structure by quarantining 66 orphaned items. Discovered D5.2 migration was dry-run only - achieved clean structure through quarantine approach instead of archival. No orphans remain in Inbox root or Personal/Meetings root.

migration_discovery.deviation_reason: Migration wasn't executed, cleanup achieved objectives through quarantine

learnings: D5.2 migration was dry-run preview only - actual execution didn't happen
66 orphan items required quarantine (16 inbox files + 20 root folders + 30 legacy files)
Quarantine approach successfully achieved clean structure objective
All orphans preserved with full provenance in _orphaned/ directory
